THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORELLI, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SODERBORG, JAMES $3,850.08 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,965.08, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $250 BY THE 5TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, UNTIL DEBT IS FULLY PAID. PLAINTIFF FULLY SUBSTANTIATED HIS CLAIM. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $250.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON FEB-05-2016 AND ON THE 5TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
